title: lithocarpus hypophoeniceus
intro: Lithocarpus hypophoeniceus, also known as the Red Bay Laurel, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Himalayas and the Indian subcontinent. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The Red Bay Laurel is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Lithocarpus hypophoeniceus is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
